sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal. Ch. to cut up, to divide, i.q. פְּסַק, which is more in use.

Piel, once, Psa 48:14, פַּסְגוּ אַרְמְנֹותֶיהָ “divide her palaces,” i.e. go round about them, unless it be preferred to render “accurately contemplate,” verbs of dividing being frequently thus applied (compare בִּין). Hence-
